versions.changelog:
## v0.27.1.0

### 🔧 Refactor

- UseStrmDirectPlay now writes real .strm files to disk ({DataPath}/gelato-strm/) instead of only setting in-memory properties. Jellyfin hands the .strm file's CDN URL directly to the client at playback time. Files are refreshed on every stream sync and cleaned up when streams are removed.

## v0.27.0.0

### 🚀 Features

- Add UseStrmDirectPlay option: when enabled, HTTP streams (e.g. Real-Debrid CDN URLs) are handed directly to the client as a redirect rather than proxied through the Jellyfin server. Torrent/P2P streams are unaffected. Option is off by default and exposed as a checkbox in the plugin config page.
